testcase.name: test_run_agent_rolls_progress_bubble_before_platform_limit

failure.message: AssertionError: expected a fresh progress bubble after the first filled assert 1 >= 2 + where 1 = len([{'chat_id': '-1001', 'content': '⚙️ terminal: "first-short"', 'metadata': {'thread_id': '17585'}, 'reply_to': None}]) + where [{'chat_id': '-1001', 'content': '⚙️ terminal: "first-short"', 'metadata': {'thread_id': '17585'}, 'reply_to': None}] = <tests.gateway.test_run_progress_topics.SmallLimitProgressAdapter object at 0x1078d6a50>.sent

testcase.failure:
monkeypatch = <_pytest.monkeypatch.MonkeyPatch object at 0x108204550> tmp_path = PosixPath('/private/var/folders/5h/f2nd43h57ll1gn08pqvv722c0000gn/T/pytest-of-bwb/pytest-3125/test_run_agent_rolls_progress_0')
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_run_agent_rolls_progress_bubble_before_platform_limit(monkeypatch, tmp_path): """Tool progress should start a second editable bubble before Telegram's limit.
Regression: once the first progress bubble grew past the platform limit, the gateway kept trying to edit that same oversized full transcript. The Telegram adapter then split-and-sent a fresh continuation on every update, causing a noisy trail of one-line messages instead of a new editable bubble. """ adapter, result = await _run_with_agent( monkeypatch, tmp_path, ManyProgressLinesAgent, session_id="sess-progress-overflow-rollover", config_data={ "display": { "tool_progress": "all", "interim_assistant_messages": False, "tool_preview_length": 60, } }, adapter_cls=SmallLimitProgressAdapter, )
assert result["final_response"] == "done" assert isinstance(adapter, SmallLimitProgressAdapter) > assert len(adapter.sent) >= 2, "expected a fresh progress bubble after the first filled" E AssertionError: expected a fresh progress bubble after the first filled E assert 1 >= 2 E + where 1 = len([{'chat_id': '-1001', 'content': '⚙️ terminal: "first-short"', 'metadata': {'thread_id': '17585'}, 'reply_to': None}]) E + where [{'chat_id': '-1001', 'content': '⚙️ terminal: "first-short"', 'metadata': {'thread_id': '17585'}, 'reply_to': None}] = <tests.gateway.test_run_progress_topics.SmallLimitProgressAdapter object at 0x1078d6a50>.sent
tests/gateway/test_run_progress_topics.py:780: AssertionError
